subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and your interest in collaborating with us. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call next week to discuss potential synergy between our teams. You can expect a follow-up from our partnership coordinator shortly with available time slots that work for both parties.

Regarding your request for internal contact details: for security and privacy reasons, we are unable to share internal directory information or direct contact lines for team members through unsolicited requests. All official partnership discussions will be coordinated through this channel initially, and we will introduce the relevant stakeholders as the conversation progresses.

Looking forward to connecting further!

Best regards,
[Agent]
